title: Imperial
description: Imperial, offers various new blocks and models to help create and mimic ornate buildings!
body:
!!! WARNING !!!
This is a beta version and very much unfinished, updates and changes will effect some blocks and cause you to lose progress. (probably not an absurd amount but some)

# Imperial:
Imperial adds thousdands of new blocks and models designed to compliment the style and tone set by Conquest Reforged. 

## Whats Included
- Classical Pediments (based on CR)
- Various new Moldings
- Roman Themed blocks and architectural elements
- Thousands of New blocks and Models with thousands of textures alongside them.


### Discord Link:
https://discord.gg/h5ESWybN7F
